requirement_topic.en: IEC 62619:2022 / IEC 62933 Evidence for BESS Safety and System Design
requirement_topic.zh: BESS安全和系统设计的IEC 62619:2022 / IEC 62933证据
requirement_topic.zht: BESS安全和系統設計的IEC 62619:2022 / IEC 62933證據

summary.en: IEC 62619:2022 and the IEC 62933 series are the common international evidence set for industrial lithium batteries and electrical energy storage systems. In Egypt, these should be treated as project, utility, insurer, customer, or authority evidence unless an Egyptian legal instrument or EOS adoption makes a specific edition mandatory for the product in scope.
summary.zh: IEC 62619:2022及IEC 62933系列是工业用锂电池和电力储能系统常见的国际证据组合。在埃及，除非埃及法律文件或EOS采标对适用产品规定了特定版本，否则应将其视为项目、公用事业、保险、客户或主管机关证据。
summary.zht: IEC 62619:2022及IEC 62933系列是工業用鋰電池和電力儲能系統常見的國際證據組合。在埃及，除非埃及法律文件或EOS採標對適用產品規定了特定版本，否則應將其視為項目、公用事業、保險、客戶或主管機關證據。

standards_or_laws: EOS adopted Egyptian standards where confirmed for the specific product scope

summary.en: China commonly relies on GB 44240-2024 for lithium cells and batteries used in electrical energy storage systems and GB/T 36276-2023 for lithium-ion batteries for electrical energy storage. These reports should be mapped to IEC 62619:2022 and IEC 62933 rather than submitted as automatic substitutes.
summary.zh: 中国通常依据GB 44240-2024规范电能存储系统用锂蓄电池和电池组，并依据GB/T 36276-2023规范电力储能用锂离子电池。相关报告应映射至IEC 62619:2022和IEC 62933，而不是作为自动替代文件提交。
summary.zht: 中國通常依據GB 44240-2024規範電能存儲系統用鋰蓄電池和電池組，並依據GB/T 36276-2023規範電力儲能用鋰離子電池。相關報告應映射至IEC 62619:2022和IEC 62933，而不是作為自動替代文件提交。

gap.en: Prepare a clause-by-clause crosswalk from Chinese GB reports to IEC 62619:2022 and the relevant IEC 62933 parts covering cells, modules, racks, BMS, PCS interfaces, enclosure, thermal management, protection logic, installation assumptions, commissioning, and operation evidence.
gap.zh: 应准备从中国GB报告到IEC 62619:2022及相关IEC 62933部分的逐条款对照，覆盖电芯、模组、电池架、BMS、PCS接口、外壳、热管理、保护逻辑、安装假设、调试和运行证据。
gap.zht: 應準備從中國GB報告到IEC 62619:2022及相關IEC 62933部分的逐條款對照，覆蓋電芯、模組、電池架、BMS、PCS介面、外殼、熱管理、保護邏輯、安裝假設、調試和運行證據。

mandatory_status.target: Voluntary or project / authority specified unless an EOS adoption, tender, utility requirement, insurer condition, or contract makes the specific IEC evidence binding
mandatory_status.cn: GB 44240-2024 is mandatory where applicable in China; GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558 are recommended unless made binding by regulation or contract

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC 62619:2022 and IEC 62933 are the practical international baseline for Egypt BESS due diligence, but the mandatory trigger must be tied to the specific EOS, GOEIC, EgyptERA, tender, insurer, or project document.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] IEC 62619:2022和IEC 62933是埃及BESS尽调的实务国际基线，但强制触发点必须对应具体EOS、GOEIC、EgyptERA、招标、保险或项目文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] IEC 62619:2022和IEC 62933是埃及BESS盡調的實務國際基線，但強制觸發點必須對應具體EOS、GOEIC、EgyptERA、招標、保險或項目文件。
